chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 959 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Hearing of Case. For hearing of main case. 23.02.2026 Mr. Ramiz Naseem,, Advocate for Petitioners. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. DSP Ayaz Ahmed Pandhiani, Foreign Registration Officer Special Branch, Karachi, SIP Jawiad Akbar FRO/SB, Karachi. ---------- Learned Deputy Attorney General files parawise comments on behalf of Respondent Nos. 2 to 5, the same are taken on record, copies whereof have been provided to the learned counsel appearing for the Petitioners. It is evident from the comments furnished that the noted Respondents have no objection the grant of the instant Petition subject to certain formalities enumerated therein. By consent, instant Petition is disposed of in the following terms:- i. The Petitioners shall obtain travel permits from the High Commission of Bangladesh, Karachi. The same shall be verified from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for confirmation of their genuineness. ii. Petitioners are allowed to travel subject to further verification of their status, criminal record, CRO/CRI. iii. The Director General NADRA Sindh is directed to verify the identity of the Petitioners through biometric for NADRA registration. If the Petitioners are registered in NADRA their CNICs may be cancelled / blocked. iv. The Director General, NADRA Sindh is further directed to provide certificate to the Petitioners subject to the above. v. After completion of all codal formalities as required under the Foreign Act 1946, the Petitioners may be permitted to travel to their native country Bangladesh.

The Director General, NADRA Sindh is further directed to provide certificate to the Petitioners subject to the above. v. After completion of all codal formalities as required under the Foreign Act 1946, the Petitioners may be permitted to travel to their native country Bangladesh. Judge Judge Ayaz
